gaps: 🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — UI state not refreshing after logout action: The bug is that the Log Out button does not update to Log In immediately after logout. The user must navigate away and back to see the change. None of the existing test cases cover UI state refresh/persistence after a destructive action (logout) within the same screen. Missing test: 'Verify that tapping Log Out immediately updates the button text to Log In without requiring screen re-entry.'

🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — Screen exit/re-entry state persistence: The bug manifests specifically when staying on the same screen after the action. Missing test: 'Verify that after logout, navigating away from Account tab and returning shows the correct Log In state (this is the workaround, not the fix).' Also missing: 'Verify that after logout, the Account tab UI refreshes correctly without any navigation away.'

🧠 STATE TRIGGER — When is the UI state actually updated?: The bug suggests the UI state is only refreshed on tab re-entry (screen focus/onResume) rather than on the button tap action itself. Missing test: 'Verify that the Account tab UI state (logged in vs logged out) refreshes immediately upon successful logout API response, not just on screen focus events.'

🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — App background/foreground after logout: Missing test: 'Verify that after logging out, sending the app to background and returning shows the correct Log In state on the Account tab.'

🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — App kill/relaunch after logout: Missing test: 'Verify that after logging out, force-killing and relaunching the app shows the Account tab in logged-out state (Log In button visible).'

🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY — No device-specific validation: The bug is in the Account tab which is common across all Poly devices (Sync 20, Sync 40, Sync 60, Free 60, Voyager series, etc.). Missing test: 'Verify Log Out -> Log In button state transition across all supported Poly device types to ensure no device-specific UI rendering differences.'
🧠 STATE TRIGGER — No test for concurrent state: Missing test: 'Verify that logging out while a device is connected/disconnecting does not cause the Account tab UI to hang or show inconsistent state.'

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-001: Immediate UI state refresh after Log Out — button text updates in-place
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app with any Poly device connected.
Ensure user is logged in (Log Out button visible).
Observe the button text immediately after logout API response completes.
Do NOT navigate away from Account tab.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Button text immediately changes to 'Log In' or 'Sign In' on the same screen without any navigation away. Actual (If Bug): Button still shows 'Log Out' until user leaves and re-enters the Account tab.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-002: Account tab state persistence after logout — navigate away and return
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Navigate to: Devices tab (or any other tab).
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button immediately upon return. Actual (If Bug): This is the workaround path — the bug may not reproduce here because re-entry triggers onResume refresh.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-003: Immediate state trigger — kill app IMMEDIATELY after logout before any navigation
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
IMMEDIATELY after logout API response (do NOT navigate away, do NOT switch tabs), force-kill the app via recent apps menu.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button. Actual (If Bug): If the UI state was never persisted to storage (only held in-memory and not committed), the app may still show 'Log Out' after relaunch, indicating the state was never saved on logout action.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-004: App background/foreground after logout — no navigation away
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Without leaving Account tab, press Home button to background the app.
Reopen app from recent apps (bring to foreground).
Verify button text on Account tab.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button immediately on foreground return. Actual (If Bug): Button still shows 'Log Out' because onResume/focus event is not triggering a state refresh, or the state was never updated on the button tap.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-005: App kill/relaunch after logout — full lifecycle persistence
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Navigate away from Account tab (e.g., to Settings tab).
Force-kill the app via recent apps menu.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' button — logout state persisted to local storage and survives app restart. Actual (If Bug): App shows 'Log Out' indicating logout state was never persisted or was lost during app termination.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-006: Log Out while device is connected — concurrent Bluetooth state
steps: Launch app with a Poly device (e.g., Sync 20) connected via Bluetooth.
While device is actively connected and streaming audio, tap Log Out.
Observe Account tab button text immediately after logout.
Verify device connection status remains unaffected.
Re-login and verify device is still manageable.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Account tab immediately shows 'Log In' button. Device remains connected and functional. Actual (If Bug): Account tab hangs, shows 'Log Out' still, or device disconnects unexpectedly due to concurrent state handling failure.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-007: Log Out while device is disconnecting — edge case concurrent state
steps: Launch app with a Poly device connected.
Initiate Bluetooth disconnect (turn off device or disable BT on phone).
While device is in disconnecting state, tap Log Out.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Log Out completes successfully, Account tab shows 'Log In' button. Device reconnects normally. Actual (If Bug): UI hangs in intermediate state, shows 'Log Out' despite successful logout, or device reconnection fails due to corrupted session state.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-008: Cross-device validation — Log Out UI refresh on Sync 20, Sync 40, Sync 60, Free 60, Voyager 5200
steps: Pair and connect each device type one at a time: Sync 20, Sync 40, Sync 60, Free 60, Voyager 5200 series.
For each device: Navigate to Account tab → Tap Log Out → Observe button text immediately → Do NOT navigate away.
Verify button text changes to 'Log In' in-place for each device.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: All device types show immediate 'Log In' button update after Log Out on the same screen. Actual (If Bug): Any device-specific UI rendering difference causes the button to not update, indicating a device-specific layout/state binding issue in the Account tab.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-009: Rapid double-tap Log Out — debounce and state consistency
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Rapidly tap Log Out button twice in quick succession (< 500ms apart).
Verify no duplicate API calls or error toasts.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: First tap triggers logout, second tap is debounced/ignored. Button updates to 'Log In' immediately. No error messages. Actual (If Bug): Double-tap causes duplicate logout API calls, UI flickers, or button incorrectly remains on 'Log Out' due to race condition in state handling.

generated_testcases.title: TC-ACCT-010: Log Out from Account tab while another tab has unsaved changes
steps: Launch app with any Poly device connected.
Modify a setting (e.g., change EQ preset) but do NOT save/apply.
Verify Account tab button updates to 'Log In' immediately.
Navigate back to Audio Settings tab.
Verify the unsaved EQ change is discarded (as expected on logout).
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: Account tab shows 'Log In' immediately. Audio Settings tab resets to saved state (unsaved changes discarded). Actual (If Bug): Account tab still shows 'Log Out', or Audio Settings tab shows stale/conflicting state after logout.
